name: freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month, inconsistent financial reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate monthly financial statements instead of manual spreadsheet tracking.
